component.name: Solero
component.summary: Mod manager for Skyrim Special Edition on Linux

description.p: Solero is a Mod Organizer-style mod manager for Skyrim Special Edition / Anniversary Edition, built for Linux and the Steam Deck. It pairs MO2's mod-list structure and UI with Vortex-style hardlink deployment, so you launch the game the normal way through Steam - no VFS proxy and no non-Steam shortcut.

ul.li: Ordered, priority-based mod list with categories, groups and per-file conflict control
Hardlink / symlink / copy deployment into the real game folder, with fast incremental deploys
Independent profiles; in-app Nexus browsing, downloads and update checks
FOMOD installer with option recall; Mod Organizer 2 and Wabbajack imports
LOOT load-order sorting; SKSE and Community Shaders management
External-tool launching through Proton with automatic output capture

screenshot.caption: The main window - mod list, plugins and deploy/play controls
The Saves tab with the savegame previewer
Conflict detection across the load order
